text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, driven by concerns over global tariffs and a new Chinese memory chipmaker potentially flooding the market. This creates headwinds for your concentrated tech/chip portfolio, especially with inflation creeping up globally.

Your holdings: SOXL (-38.11%) and SPAL (-52.96%) are both leveraged ETFs significantly below their stops, needing immediate attention due to accelerated decay and margin implications. QQQI (-5.44%) is also flagged for SELL and close to its stop.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical trade tensions and any further news on the chip sector, particularly regarding supply and pricing.

Bottom line: Prioritize aggressive risk management on your leveraged positions; margin amplifies these drawdowns.
plays: Your 3X leveraged SOXL is down -38.11% and trading well below its 200 stop at 157.5. Consider selling or significantly trimming this position to mitigate further decay and margin risk.
The leveraged SPAL is down -52.96% and also trading below its 21.38 stop at 11.83. This position warrants immediate review for sale or significant trim.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
